name: Sabir Ahamed
description: National Research Coordinator at Pratichi Institute, Pratichi (India) Trust, and the founder of the 'Know Your Neighbour' initiative at Sabar Institute.

name: Souptik Halder
description: Researcher at ISI Kolkata with a strong background in data science and machine learning, specializing in computaional methods in social data analysis.

name: Ashin Chakraborty
description: Researcher in Economics with a strong passion for leveraging data-driven insights to drive real-world change
